batch_summary.note: Apr 2024: 1 primary RF-09 signal. S004 — agreement denial, Level B. Arc ACTIVE (4 signals).

primary_flags.message_text: You agreed to things then didn't do them
primary_flags.summary: Apr 2024: Melissa claims Eli agreed to unspecified terms and then failed to follow through. ROW-4909: 'You agreed to things then didn't do them' — Level B agreement denial: Melissa asserts a prior agreement exists (or existed) and that Eli has violated it. The specifics of the alleged agreement are not elaborated in this message, making this a Level B signal (agreement denial without sufficient specificity to resolve as Level A direct contradiction). Evidence Level B per ADD-001: agreement-denial language without a named specific agreement that can be cross-referenced. Sev-1 per Q2 calibration threshold: plausible genuine disagreement about prior agreements at this stage. No compound pattern — no DARVO sequence or other RF overlap identified in this cluster. Forward awareness note: if Melissa later asserts 'we agreed to X' and text shows no such agreement or a different agreement, this retroactively elevates to Level A.
